hooks.command: grep -qiE 'build|implement|create|feature' && echo 'REMINDER: this looks like a feature build. Per AGENTS.md, run /architect first and confirm a plan before writing code.' || true

f=$(grep -oE '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1); printf '%s' "$f" | grep -qiE 'components/|[.]tsx"' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: you edited a UI component. Run /imprint to capture its patterns into ui-registry.md before finishing (first run on this project: /imprint audit)."}}' || true
